name: @geneweave/desktop
description: geneWeave desktop app — a Tauri v2 shell around the geneWeave web build (global quick-capture, offline notes cache, native menus, signed auto-update).

scripts.//: The native desktop app needs the Rust toolchain (and a valid Tauri config), which are NOT part of the headless TS workspace or CI. So build no-ops by default and only runs the native Tauri build when you opt in with DESKTOP_NATIVE_BUILD=1 — this keeps the repo-wide turbo build (and start-geneweave.sh) green everywhere, while still producing a real native build on a properly set-up machine.
scripts.build: if [ "$DESKTOP_NATIVE_BUILD" = "1" ] && { command -v tauri >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x node_modules/.bin/tauri ]; }; then tauri build; else echo '[@geneweave/desktop] Skipping the native desktop build (set DESKTOP_NATIVE_BUILD=1 with Rust + the Tauri CLI installed to produce a native build).'; fi
